2021:29506.name: Will AI is the official AI brand IP of AISWEI, and also the carrier of the company’s AI capabilities. It acts not only as a friendly and interesting "colleague", but also as the core brand symbol embedding all AI functions. It helps fulfill the vision: Will AI + AISWEIer = Full-link AI intelligent office.
